title: sempervivum marmoreum f. brunneifolium
intro: Sempervivum marmoreum f. brunneifolium, also known as the perennial houseleek or hens and chicks, is a succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, offering benefits such as accelerated wound healing, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function. Sempervivum marmoreum f. brunneifolium can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is also used in skincare products due to its soothing and protective properties.
